header.title: How I Work
header.description: Mobile apps backed by reliable systems — built to stay fast and stable under real usage.

mission.title: Production-first mindset
mission.content: Mobile-first systems, supported by reliable backend and infrastructure. Built to stay fast and stable under real load.

vision.title: Stability over complexity
vision.content: Simple, predictable systems beat over-engineered ones. Easier to maintain, easier to scale, less likely to break.

ownership.title: End-to-end ownership
ownership.content: From mobile app to deployment, everything is designed to work together — no fragile integrations between layers.

automation.title: Practical automation
automation.content: AI-assisted automation that reduces manual work and improves system reliability.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.desc: Fast and responsive mobile apps designed for real usage, supported by reliable backend systems.

backend.title: Backend Engineering
backend.desc: Server-side systems built to handle real-world conditions — stable, maintainable, and predictable.

system.title: System Administration
system.desc: Deployment and infrastructure handled with a focus on consistency, uptime, and minimal maintenance.

security.title: Network & Security
security.desc: Secure and well-structured networking setups that protect systems without unnecessary complexity.

contact.title:
Need to build
or
 fix a system?
contact.subtitle: If you're building something that needs to work reliably at scale, feel free to reach out.

portfolio.title: Featured Projects
portfolio.description: A collection of systems and applications built with a focus on stability, performance, and clean architecture.

industaiq.title: IndustAIQ Console
industaiq.description: Developed within the Indust.One ecosystem for real-time industrial data interpretation. Turns machine errors and signals into clear insights, enabling faster response. Reduces manual investigation and improves system reliability over time.

telemetry.title: Industrial Telemetry Platform (Confidential)
telemetry.description: Lightweight industrial telemetry platform designed to run even on low-resource devices. Collects PLC data through a custom gateway and delivers it to clients in real time. Focused on performance and modular system design.

media_server.title: Media Ingestion Server
media_server.description: High-performance backend for processing and delivering video content. Handles stream resolution and media assembly internally via a controlled worker system for stable performance under load.

bls.title: Minimal Login & Session Manager (BLS)
bls.description: Lightweight login and session launcher for Unix-like systems. Designed to replace traditional display managers with direct control over authentication and session startup. Focuses on minimal dependency and low-level system interaction.

portfolio.title: tayfunucuncu.dev
portfolio.description: Self-hosted portfolio website with clean architecture, running on a custom homelab setup.
portfolio.blog_teaser: A blog covering questionable homelab decisions is coming soon.
